title: Improve memory continuity for 'session_management'
description: 'context_loss' causes 0% failure rate in 'session_management' tasks. Tiered memory or session hydration improvements needed.

implementation.changes:
1. For context_loss: add critical session_management context to HEARTBEAT.md pre-fetch
2. For memory_miss: improve tiered-memory tagging for session_management
3. For compaction_lost_context: add WAL entry for session_management state
4. Run: uv run python skills/tiered-memory/scripts/memory_cli.py store

expected_improvement: Restore continuity for session_management tasks across session resets
deployment_notes: Manually applied 2026-03-05: HEARTBEAT.md updated + router rate_limit fallback + context_loss prevention added
